style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, in two panels. LEFT panel labelled HUMAN SPEED: a request arrow travels down through four stacked layers and back up, beside a clock face captioned ABOUT ONE MONTH and a small note A FEW AT A TIME. RIGHT panel labelled MACHINE SPEED: the same arrow loops straight down and back in a tight cycle beside a clock captioned ONE SECOND and a note TENS OF THOUSANDS OF ISSUES A DAY. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, in two panels. LEFT panel labelled HUMAN SPEED: a request arrow travels down through four stacked layers and back up, beside a clock face captioned ABOUT ONE MONTH and a small note A FEW AT A TIME. RIGHT panel labelled MACHINE SPEED: the same arrow loops straight down and back in a tight cycle beside a clock captioned ONE SECOND and a note TENS OF THOUSANDS OF ISSUES A DAY. The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
